name: @borjie/timezone-detection
description: SOTA timezone detection + per-user TZ rendering. Composite priority resolver (account > jwt-claim > browser > ip > jurisdiction > UTC), 54 African + ROW jurisdiction defaults, DST edge-case handlers (spring-forward / fall-back), per-user render helpers, Hono + Fastify middleware. Zero runtime dependencies — uses native Intl + tzdata shipped with Node 20+.
